comments: General rate durations for various bars and boosts:
This 'comments' field is for reference only, ignored by the game and not saved.

items.name: Air
items.description: Loosely-knit atmosphere surrounding the planet, a firmament to displace the emptiness of space. About as big as the volume of earth and water combined.

items.name: Ambient Energy
items.description:
At first, indeterminate flashes of energy are the only thing distinguishable from nothingness. The energy seems unlimited. Maybe it even is.
{yellow|
```
        |
<*>   -<*>-   *
        |
```
}

items.name: Attentively Collected Beam
items.description: No waiting required, but struggles to keep pace once upgrades start coming in.

items.name: 🏁Base Speed Factor
items.description:
Set this quantity (*{lemonchiffon|BSF}*) to a multiplier such as:
```
0.5   : slow
1     : normal — no change
2     : somewhat faster
10    : fast
100   : practically no idling — incremental only
```
You'll be using this to multiply gains for bars and elements, starting with *Red Bar Rate*.

For upgrades and other low-quantity items, you can also reduce how long it takes. Set *Duration Multiplier* and then go to *Recipe Durations*.

items.name: ⬛Black Bar
Black Bar Boost I
items.description: Gain per Batch +1 each

items.name: Black Fabric
items.description: Weave black light into an intricate, structured fabric that underlies and supports the universe.

items.name: 🟦Blue Bar
items.description:
Gather tranquil blue wavelengths of light.
{blue|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Blue Bar Boost I
items.description: Gain per Batch +0.5 each

items.name: Boost II Factor
items.description: For each boost II, multiply the rate by this fixed value. With a calculator, for example with 6 boost II upgrades, the formula is 1.5$^{6}$ = 11.39. Or, with event aids, press the button 6 times.

items.name: Distance Force
items.description:
Supports three-dimensional space so that things can be in different places. Everything else in physics depends on spacetime, including interactions like gravity.

*Note: While this could be seen as playing God, I prefer to think of the player role in this scenario as an observer, with apparent choices actually predestined.*

items.name: Earth
items.description: Soil that holds its form, land. While earth does reach this planet's center, so does water, with tunnels, caverns and outcroppings in the depths. Both surface and depths include areas covered by earth roughly equal in size to those of water.

items.name: Fire Force
items.description: Enables the reaction of grouped colors to generate energy.

items.name: Gravity Force
🟩Green Bar
items.description:
Shape green wavelengths into a form, a rectangular prism. Quantity describes the length from one end to the other.
{green|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Green Bar Boost I
items.description: Increases gain per batch by +0.5 each. Go to *Green Bar Rate* to perform the upgrade.

items.name: Green Bar Boost II
items.description:
Gain per Batch × 1.5

This means increasing by 50% each, exponentially. So, the green bar gain per batch with all boosts I and II is:
```5 × 1.5$^{6}$ = 57 per 8 seconds```

items.name: Life Force
items.description: Required for living beings such as plants. Creating this force will consume all remaining ambient energy.

items.name: 🟧Orange Bar
items.description:
An especially vibrant color.
{orange|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Orange Bar Boost I
items.description: Gain per Batch +1 each

items.name: 🟥Red Bar
items.description:
Select red wavelengths. Creating the first bar of light marks the start of meaningful time, the first different state.
{red|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Red Bar Boost I
items.description: *Gain per batch* 1 each. See *Red Bar Rate* to perform the upgrade.

items.name: Red Bar Boost II
items.description:
Gain per Batch × 1.5

Multiplying for each upgrade means the total benefit is exponential, so with a base of 20 from all *Red Bar Boost I* upgrades, the gain per batch becomes:
```20 × 1.5$^{6}$ = 228```

items.name: Red Fabric
items.description: Weave red light into an early, basic fabric that underlies and supports the universe. So named because it comes from red light, not because it has a color of its own.

items.name: Seed
items.description: The beginning of something greater. Place it just underneath the surface of the land.

items.name: Star
items.description:
Gigantic heat-generating sphere on a scale that even imagining threatens to overwhelm the mind.

{lemonchiffon|After constructing:}
• Configure [this location](/configure/location/43) to unmask and show in Overview.
• Hide the [Local Solar System](/configure/location/44) from Overview by unchecking the box.
• Go to *Solar Rates* to apply *{lemonchiffon|BSF}* if different from default setting.

items.name: Sticky Force
items.description: Binds colors together into patterned materials. Also allows drawing light from the sun.

items.name: Terra Anchor Point
items.description: Where to build the new planet—a reference point in space. Gravity holds the materials together.

items.name: Tree
items.description:
{saddlebrown|Roots push deep into the earth, a mighty trunk stands tall, branches spread toward the heavens, and {green|leaves} drink {yellow|sunlight}}.

*{#333333|World Tree... Tree of Life... Tree of Knowledge...
wisdom, connection, growth}*

items.name: 🟪Violet Bar
items.description:
At the end of the visible spectrum.
{violet|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Water
items.description: It's wet! And inconstant, shifting. Bind blue light together tightly in regular amounts.

items.name: ⬜White Bar
items.description:
Mix all other wavelengths for the pinnacle of light combination, the seventh.
{white|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: White Bar Boost I
items.description: Gain per Batch +1 each

items.name: 🟨Yellow Bar
items.description:
Combine light to produce this secondary color.
{yellow|
```
 _____________
/____________/
```
}

items.name: Yellow Bar Boost I
items.description: Gain per Batch +1 each

locations.name: Local Solar System
locations.description: An area designated to hold a star orbited by celestial bodies.

locations.name: Planet
locations.description: Ever new possibilities present themselves as we begin to see what the Sticky Force can do in this place, Terra. Rather than cosmically large and powerful, things here are of lesser scale but beautiful.

attribs.name: Duration Multiplier
attribs.description:
Set this multiplier according to the table below, generally 5% less per *{lemonchiffon|BSF}* above 1. Then apply the [Recipe Durations](/play/event/51?subject_id=41) changes.

```
{lemonchiffon|BSF}    multiplier
---    ----------
0.5    1.1
1      no change
2      0.9
4      0.8
5      0.75
8      0.6
10     0.5
```

events.name: Black Bar Rate
events.description: Does **not** get directly increased by the {lemonchiffon|BSF}.

events.name: Black Bar Reset
events.description:
After gaining the max Black Bars possible, press *Resolve*. Then, press *Apply All* to do the following:

- Reset rates and boosts of {red|#} (1/8s, [I](/play/item/3), [II](/play/item/4)) and {green|#} (0.5/8s, [I](/play/item/2), [II](/play/item/33))
- Set quantities of {red|#}, {green|#}, and {yellow|#} to 0

events.name: Green Bar Rate
events.description: Press **Resolve** to determine the rate and set *Gain per Batch* for *Green Bar*.

events.name: Recipe Durations
events.description:
After choosing the BSF, set the [Duration Multiplier](/play/attrib/53/subject/41). 

Then press *Resolve* and use the *Apply* buttons.

events.name: Red Bar Rate
events.description: Press **Resolve** to determine the rate and set *Gain per Batch* for *Red Bar*.

events.name: Solar Rates
events.description: For bar recipes that draw from solar energy, along with elements.

overall settings.title: Rays
